statements: Filth like you should never have entered my halls.
I should have your head mounted before the gates.
You are nothing—less than the dirt beneath my throne.
Kneel, or I will break you where you stand.
I will enjoy watching you beg.
You think yourself worthy of facing me? Laughable.
I have executed better warriors before breakfast.
Your blood will stain these floors, and no one will remember your name.
You are a mistake that I will personally erase.
Look at you… weak, trembling, insignificant.
I will make an example of you.
